data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: UI design ensures quicker target selection.
data.technical_spec: Buttons and interactive elements are sized appropriately and placed conveniently.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Streamlined decision-making process through simplified navigation.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design reduces the cognitive load for users making decisions.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits the number of choices presented to maintain user focus.
data.technical_spec: UI adheres to presenting an optimal number of options (7±2) to users.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Consistent design aligns with user expectations from similar popular sites.
data.technical_spec: Adopts design patterns that users are already familiar with to enhance usability.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: User experience is gauged not just by usability but by memorable moments.
data.technical_spec: Focus on delivering stand-out experiences during key interactions.
